markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final launch readiness check for the CheckThat soft launch.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Blocker:** A critical bug (`CHG698`) prevents new users from completing onboarding by stalling on the "Generating Context" page.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**Immediate Fix:** Pedro will investigate and fix `CHG698` immediately after the call to unblock the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Launch Plan:** The soft launch will proceed today, starting with trusted customers who understand the product is in active development.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**User Monitoring:** Stevie will use PostHog to monitor user behavior for friction points (e.g., rage-clicking) caused by the prompt backfill debouncing.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Blocker: "Generating Context" Page

  - [**Problem:** The onboarding workflow stalls on the "Generating Context" page, preventing users from proceeding.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**Impact:** Blocks all new users, including internal customers, from accessing the product.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**Root Cause Investigation:**](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Hypothesis 1:** Webhook failures related to Cloudflare.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [**Hypothesis 2:** Issues with the new `output workflows repository`.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Initial Check:** Stevie found no failed Temporal workflows in the `output` service.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Rejected Workaround:** Allowing manual context entry was rejected due to a race condition where the automated workflow could overwrite user data.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Launch Strategy & User Monitoring

  - [**Decision:** Proceed with the soft launch today, targeting trusted customers.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Prioritize getting user feedback over delaying for final polish.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Monitoring Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**Intercom:** Leonardo will monitor for support requests.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**PostHog:** Stevie will analyze user recordings for behavior patterns (e.g., rage-clicking) to identify friction points.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

### Pre-Launch Tasks

  - [**Onboarding Polish:** Estevão to complete UI/UX improvements for the onboarding flow.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Clerk Email Restrictions:** Estevão to implement two sign-up restrictions:](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Personal Emails:** Block common domains (e.g., Gmail, Outlook) using a blocklist.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**Sub-addresses:** Limit usage of email sub-addresses (`+test`) to a single sign-up per user.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Prompt Backfill Debouncing:** Jose implemented a 5-minute debounce on backfills triggered by prompt changes to prevent system overload.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** The timer starts on the *first* change in a session; subsequent changes within 5 minutes are ignored.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach is simpler to implement and avoids user confusion compared to a "wait 5 minutes after the *latest* change" model.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

### Post-Launch Priorities

  - **Ticket \#687 (Subcategory/Competitor Cap):** Estevão will implement this after completing the onboarding polish.
  - **Ticket \#657 (Flagging Bad Brands):** Pedro paused work on this to prioritize the `CHG698` blocker.
      - [**Goal:** Automatically detect and flag brands with empty profiles or mismatched names to ensure data quality.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
      - [**Proposed Action:** Move flagged brands to "private" and enable admin filtering for review.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Complete onboarding UI/UX polish.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Implement Clerk email restrictions.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - Begin work on Ticket \#687 (Subcategory/Competitor Cap).
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [Merge the prompt backfill PR.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
      - [Create a ticket for the prompt backfill debouncing feature.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Leonardo:**](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Monitor Intercom for support requests.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Reschedule 1-on-1 meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [Monitor PostHog user recordings for onboarding friction.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Send soft launch invitations to trusted customers.](https://fathom.video/share/KrDK8Tya6MQHxyQ6FYjEsjYudP9FtLtx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
